dryingspeedoverhaul:craftinginfo-dryings:
All values shown are defaults and can be changed in the mod config file.

Temperature
Below 0°C drying stops. At 30°C drying runs at normal speed. At 60°C drying runs at 2x speed.
Rooms provide an insulation bonus of +8°C, or +12°C in a small room.

Nearby Heat Source
A nearby heat source within 3 blocks greatly increases drying speed. Distance matters — closer is stronger.
Heat sources override cold temperatures, clamping the effective temperature to at least 30°C.

Wind
Wind increases drying speed up to 1.5x at full wind. Only works outside.

Rain
Rain makes items wetter, pushing drying speed negative. Requires skylight access.

Storage Type
Open storage — any display container such as tool racks, drying racks, and ground piles: 1.0x
Entity inventories such as players and boats: 0.5x
Closed storage such as chests and barrels: 0.25x

Display containers are considered open storage because their contents are exposed to the environment. This includes anything that visually displays its items in the world, such as tool racks, drying racks, and ground storage piles.

Rooms
Being inside a room blocks wind and rain, provides a temperature insulation bonus, and allows a nearby heat source to affect all items inside the room.
